title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: SWEET HOME PUBLIC LIBRARY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, jackets, and blankets. 1101 13th Avenue Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-6pm, Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 11am-3pm Email (541) 367-5007 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 367-5007 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Linn shuttle bus stop located across the street Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
